name: design-studio
description: A virtual design studio that assembles specialist roles for any design task. Creates production UI (HTML/CSS/JS), designs directly in Figma (pages, components, styles, wireframes), audits design compliance, generates developer handoff docs, creates responsive variants, and provides automated UX critique. Commands: /design, /design-review, /design-system, /figma, /figma-create, /ux-audit, /design-handoff, /figma-responsive
